stemHtml:
For planning purposes, determine the net distance travelled down to 4000 ft for a single-engine piston aircraft following an engine failure at 8000 ft. Given the following data:

TAS: 120 kts
GS: 150 kts
Gross gradient of descent 11%
Gross/net gradient decrement 0.5%
Still air distance (ft) = (Height difference (ft) x 100) / % net gradient
Ground distance = still air distance x (groundspeed / TAS)
